detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SACRED._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SACRED.sol#641-765):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SACRED.sol#705)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SACRED.sol#779-791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SACRED.sol#711)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SACRED.sol#799)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SACRED.sol#763)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SACRED.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SACRED.sol#905)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SACRED.sol#907)
	SACRED._rOwned (SACRED.sol#317) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SACRED._takeTeam(uint256) (SACRED.sol#919-927)
	- SACRED._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SACRED.sol#879-915)
	- SACRED.balanceOf(address) (SACRED.sol#467-471)
	- SACRED.constructor() (SACRED.sol#401-431)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SACRED.sol#763)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SACRED.sol#933)
	SACRED._rTotal (SACRED.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SACRED._getCurrentSupply() (SACRED.sol#1075-1085)
	- SACRED._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SACRED.sol#931-937)
	- SACRED.constructor() (SACRED.sol#401-431)
	- SACRED.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SACRED.sol#563-585)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SACRED._transfer(address,address,uint256)](SACRED.sol#L641-L765):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](SACRED.sol#L705)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](SACRED.sol#L779-L791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](SACRED.sol#L711)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](SACRED.sol#L799)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SACRED.sol#L763)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](SACRED.sol#L925)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](SACRED.sol#L905)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](SACRED.sol#L907)
	[SACRED._rOwned](SACRED.sol#L317) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SACRED._takeTeam(uint256)](SACRED.sol#L919-L927)
	- [SACRED._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](SACRED.sol#L879-L915)
	- [SACRED.balanceOf(address)](SACRED.sol#L467-L471)
	- [SACRED.constructor()](SACRED.sol#L401-L431)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SACRED.sol#L763)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](SACRED.sol#L933)
	[SACRED._rTotal](SACRED.sol#L329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SACRED._getCurrentSupply()](SACRED.sol#L1075-L1085)
	- [SACRED._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](SACRED.sol#L931-L937)
	- [SACRED.constructor()](SACRED.sol#L401-L431)
	- [SACRED.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](SACRED.sol#L563-L585)
